name: David Alan Grier
bio: David Alan Grier is an American actor and comedian who rose to fame in the sketch comedy series In Living Color, where he appeared across all five seasons and played characters such as Antoine Merriweather in Men on Film. A veteran stand-up and stage actor, he won a Tony Award for the 2020 Broadway revival of A Soldiers Play. He was ranked number 94 on Comedy Centrals 100 Greatest Stand-Ups in 2004.

timeline.ev: Joined the cast of In Living Color
Ranked No. 94 on Comedy Centrals 100 Greatest Stand-Ups
Won Tony Award for A Soldiers Play

accolades: Tony Award, Best Featured Actor in a Play (A Soldiers Play, 2020)
No. 94 on Comedy Centrals 100 Greatest Stand-Ups

specials.t: The Book of David: The Cult Figures Manifesto
